name: Return Signals
long_description:
AI customer support that proactively engages high-value users. By using LLM’s to engage customers in an authentic way before they reach out to customer support we minimize support tickets, build relationships and deliver upsells.

Because we are helpful and human-like, our SMS outbound has 4-10x higher response rate than Emotive/Attentive/Postscript or any other product on the market.
one_liner: AI customer support that proactively engages high-value users
